title: Original birth certificate; required contents; sex of child
doc_html:
§34.3. Original birth certificate; required contents; sex of child

            The sex of the child shall be entered on the original birth certificate.

            Acts 2016, No. 434, §3.
doc_text:
§34.3.  Original birth certificate; required contents; sex of child
The sex of the child shall be entered on the original birth certificate.
Acts 2016, No. 434, §3.
